did.head: DESCRIPTIVE SUMMARY
did.physdesc: Manuscripts, correspondence, newspaper clippings, financial records, and legal documents.
did.repository:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell
University Library
did.abstract:
Letters and papers, mainly those of Chester
Patterson and D. Williams Patterson Tioga County, New York.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p:
Letters and papers, mainly those of Chester Patterson and D. Williams
Patterson Tioga County, New York; collection includes deeds, wills, bail bonds,
bank notes, court documents, tax due lists and sales notices; also loose
accounts and account books, and a bound volume of a doctor's journals.
Collection includes a bound volume of mounted manuscripts (chiefly of
Massachusetts origin), a copy of the will of James Patterson of Billerica,
Massachusetts, and of Joseph Patterson; also, deeds, tax assessments, and
newspaper clippings.

unittitle.extref: Link to a PDF finding aid.

scopecontent.p: All the material in the collection may not be covered by this guide.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p:
Patterson family papers, #286. Division of Rare and Manuscript
Collections, Cornell University Library.
